reference: You can proceed with the second intrauterine insemination, but for the success of intrauterine insemination, a satisfactory follicular size is eighteen to twenty millimeters in at least one ovary.
text: You can proceed with the second intrauterine insemination, but for the success of intrauterine insemination, a satisfactory follicular size is 18-20 mm in at least one ovum.
